iteration_history.description: Baseline from Step 4 VALIDATOR (before refinement). Union of failures across 3 methods: T018, T029, T031, T033, T040, T044.

Cluster-level package of 2 fixes: (a) encoding - VRN1 single KO gm loosened 0.997->0.9 per Liu 2025 paper-specific dosage evidence; (b) structural - removed TAGRF4 node (+ edges N022, N023) because GRF4-DELLA is post-translational competition not level-regulation, and Li 2018 itself states GRF4 OE does not increase mature height.

fixes_applied.description: Loosened VRN1 single-homeolog KO gene_modifier from 0.997 to 0.9 for test T031 (VRN1_single_ko).
fixes_applied.reason: T031 failed algebraic (ratio=0.9998, predicted unchanged, expected decreased). The 0.997 composite-redundancy convention is too conservative for the specific paper, which documents an unexpected dosage effect on height despite A/B/D redundancy for flowering.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Liu et al. 2025 Plant Communications explicitly report 3.7-5 cm height reduction for single-homeolog vrn1 CRISPR lines (5A, 5B, 5D) in cv. Fielder under field conditions. This demonstrates that VRN1 is NOT purely redundant for plant height even though it is for heading date. gm=0.9 captures this ~4% reduction while preserving the 'slight decrease' magnitude class.

fixes_applied.description: Removed the RHT_B1 -> TAGRF4 inhibition edge (N022) as part of TAGRF4-node removal.
fixes_applied.reason: Upstream half of a mutually-inhibitory pair that misrepresented post-translational competition as transcriptional regulation. Removed together with N023 and the TAGRF4 node.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Li et al. 2018 Nature and Zhang et al. 2023 PNAS describe the GRF4-DELLA interaction as competitive protein binding (GRF4 displaces PLATZ1 from the DELLA GRAS domain; Zhang 2023 Y3H shows 74% reduction in PLATZ1-DELLA interaction upon GRF4 co-expression). This is a post-translational equilibrium, not transcriptional regulation of DELLA levels. Modelling it as a level-multiplier produced a spurious amplification signal inconsistent with Li 2018's own observation that GRF4 OE 'boosts grain yield and NUE of rice and wheat GRVs without increasing mature plant height'.

fixes_applied.description: Removed the TAGRF4 -> RHT_B1 inhibition edge (N023) as part of TAGRF4-node removal.
fixes_applied.reason: Downstream half of the mutually-inhibitory pair. Its presence caused the T033 failure: TaGRF4 OE drove RHT_B1 to the bounded-inverse inhibition floor, producing a cascade-amplified ratio of 25.12 on Plant_Height (predicted increased, expected unchanged).
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Same as N022: GRF4-DELLA is a binding equilibrium, not a regulatory edge. Li et al. 2018 explicitly state GRF4 OE does not raise mature plant height; the model prediction of +25x height under GRF4 OE was a framework artefact. The interaction remains recorded in curated_edges.json as a DELLA-binding factor without entering the predictive model.

fixes_applied.description: Test T033 (TaGRF4_oe) set to in_network=false after TAGRF4 node removal.
fixes_applied.reason: TaGRF4 no longer mapped to any network node. Test becomes untestable in this network representation. This is an intended consequence of the TAGRF4 structural removal.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Li et al. 2018 report GRF4 OE does not increase mature plant height, so the 'expected=unchanged' outcome is effectively the null hypothesis. With TaGRF4 absent from the network, the model makes no prediction, rather than the previous incorrect amplified prediction.
